guidence to unlock the next game.  Stuck in only one.  Anybody knows please explain.
Wow. I really enjoyed this puzzle game. The info it gives while doing the puzzle and the after it's done was amazing. I'm just sad there was only one animal available.

reviews.review_title: Cool relaxing game, needs more content
reviews.review_description:
Fun app. You can change the music on your hand menu for more calm, then with the voiceover it feels like a realtime documentary movie :)
Good starting point for a nice relaxing game. Needs more puzzles, animals and interactions. I hope it will grow soon.

Great virtual reality puzzle game with realistic graphics and intuitive controls. Highly recommended for puzzle fans. :) 
I'm waiting for more animals!

Animal Jigsaw VR is a great proposal for puzzle and animal lovers, which not only offers wonderful entertainment, but also an interesting way to learn information about animals. Building realistic 3D animal models allows discovering fascinating details about their appearance and structure. Additionally, players can listen to facts and information about a given animal, which are played when they manage to complete the puzzle. This is an excellent way to learn about different animal species and their interesting features. The game develops hand-eye coordination and knowledge about animals, making it a great proposition for both children and adults.
I am happy to have found this gmae. my baby loves it too.
